work_summary: Confirmed the new /admin/files page depended on media list/delete routes that were missing from the checked-in backend.
Added secure admin media list/delete endpoints plus response schemas while preserving public media upload/download behavior.
Aligned frontend /admin/files list/delete calls with /api/v1/admin/media and kept upload/download on /api/v1/media.
Added focused backend media endpoint tests and verified pytest, targeted lint, and full frontend build.
priority_actions: Run WSL smoke test for /admin/files: upload -> list -> download -> delete.
Decide commit scope for CodeX media fix vs Claude UI/skill changes still in the dirty worktree.
Review Claude Task #24 skills-audit summary before further skill or design-system changes.
Commit intended changes on feat/ui-workflow-audit and open PR to main.

context_for_next_agent.stable_base: Branch feat/ui-workflow-audit already includes commit 2f06695 with admin auth/menu/role guard fixes from CodeX.
context_for_next_agent.current_branch_state: Dirty worktree contains Claude UI overhaul changes, Claude skill-audit edits, and this CodeX media contract fix.
context_for_next_agent.media_contract: Frontend admin files page now expects GET/DELETE /api/v1/admin/media for authenticated listing/deletion and still uses public POST/GET /api/v1/media for upload/download.
context_for_next_agent.skills_audit_artifacts: Claude's 2026-03-15 19:00 checkpoint and session summary are present and indexed.

cross_platform_read.key_insight: Admin auth/menu/role guard fixes are already on this branch in commit 2f06695.
Claude introduced the /admin/files browser as part of the UI overhaul, which exposed the missing media list/delete backend contract.
Live-chat migration planning remains reference context only; it was not part of this media fix.
SESSION_INDEX/TASK_LOG/checkpoint/summary updates are mandatory for every handoff.
